hero.subtitle: Building digital products with Node.js, React and React Native for 6+ years.

about.title: About me
about.bio1: I'm a fullstack developer with 6+ years of experience. For over 5 years I worked at Waac (Compare Planos de Saúde), developing internal CRM systems for sales, HR and finance departments, and lead-generation websites for the health insurance sector.
about.bio2: I have expertise in TypeScript/JavaScript across all layers: REST APIs with Node.js and NestJS, frontends with React and Next.js, and mobile apps with React Native.
about.entrepreneur_desc: Building and launching own products end-to-end, from idea to deployment. Open to CLT, PJ or freelance opportunities.
about.waac_desc: Developed internal CRM systems for sales, HR and finance departments, and lead-generation websites for the health insurance sector (Compare Planos de Saúde).
